headlines: Nvidia-backed optics vendor to boost wafer output by 4x to meet AI interconnect demand

crew_quote: "Blimey, with all that AI and password trouble, it’s a wonder we’re not all wandering around in soggy socks at 21.4 degrees — let's hope the curry doesn't steal my passwords!"
